headline: On the 569k-delivery benchmark, incremental processing billed +1.95% MORE bytes than a full rebuild (unpartitioned raw source: every strategy scans the full landing view) while using 62.7% less compute (median slot-ms) and comparable runtime. The ablation shows where byte savings actually live: the identical 7-day reconciliation query processed 523.9x fewer bytes on partitioned storage. No extrapolation to production or Monzo scale.
